testcase.name: Accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA) › homepage should have no critical accessibility violations
Admin Page › unauthenticated user is redirected to login
Admin Page › non-admin user is redirected to home
Admin Page › admin user sees dashboard
AI Models Page › 应该显示AI模型列表
AI Models Page › 应该正确处理NULL分数显示
AI Models Page › 应该支持模型类型筛选
AI Models Page › 应该支持排序功能
AI Models Page › 模型详情页面跳转
AI Models Page › 响应式设计测试
AI Models Page › 搜索功能测试
AI Models Page › 数据加载状态测试
Authentication Flow › User can successfully login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: Test: Starting login test with credentials: demo Test: Navigating to login page Auth API response: http://localhost:5173/login [33m200[39m Response body: <!doctype html> <html lang="en"> <head> <script type="module">import { injectIntoGlobalHook } from "/@react-refresh"; injectIntoGlobalHook(window); window.$RefreshReg$ = () => {}; window.$Refr Test: Login form is visible Test: Filling login form Mock: Intercepting login request to: http://localhost:8001/api/v1/auth/login Login request data: username=demo&password=demo123 Login credentials: demo [REDACTED] Mock: Sending successful login response Auth API response: http://localhost:8001/api/v1/auth/login [33m200[39m Response body: {"access_token":"mock-jwt-token-1773612898783","token_type":"bearer"} Test: Waiting for redirect to home page Test: Checking auth token storage Test: Auth token retrieved: YES Test: Verifying successful redirect to home page Test: Login test completed successfully

testcase.name: Authentication Flow › Guest mode allows access without authentication
Authentication Flow › Login fails with invalid credentials
testcase.system-out: Auth API response: http://localhost:5173/login [33m200[39m Response body: <!doctype html> <html lang="en"> <head> <script type="module">import { injectIntoGlobalHook } from "/@react-refresh"; injectIntoGlobalHook(window); window.$RefreshReg$ = () => {}; window.$Refr Mock: Intercepting login request to: http://localhost:8001/api/v1/auth/login Login request data: username=invalid_user&password=wrong_password Login credentials: invalid_user [REDACTED] Mock: Sending failed login response Auth API response: http://localhost:8001/api/v1/auth/login [33m401[39m Response body: {"detail":"Invalid username or password"}

testcase.name: Authentication Flow › JWT token persists across page refreshes
testcase.system-out: Auth API response: http://localhost:5173/login [33m200[39m Response body: <!doctype html> <html lang="en"> <head> <script type="module">import { injectIntoGlobalHook } from "/@react-refresh"; injectIntoGlobalHook(window); window.$RefreshReg$ = () => {}; window.$Refr Mock: Intercepting login request to: http://localhost:8001/api/v1/auth/login Login request data: username=demo&password=demo123 Login credentials: demo [REDACTED] Mock: Sending successful login response Auth API response: http://localhost:8001/api/v1/auth/login [33m200[39m Response body: {"access_token":"mock-jwt-token-1773612929778","token_type":"bearer"} Initial token set: mock-jwt-token-1773612929778 Token after refresh: mock-jwt-token-1773612929778 Application can access token: [33mtrue[39m

testcase.name: Authentication Flow › Logout functionality clears authentication
testcase.system-out: Auth API response: http://localhost:5173/login [33m200[39m Response body: <!doctype html> <html lang="en"> <head> <script type="module">import { injectIntoGlobalHook } from "/@react-refresh"; injectIntoGlobalHook(window); window.$RefreshReg$ = () => {}; window.$Refr Mock: Intercepting login request to: http://localhost:8001/api/v1/auth/login Login request data: username=demo&password=demo123 Login credentials: demo [REDACTED] Mock: Sending successful login response Auth API response: http://localhost:8001/api/v1/auth/login [33m200[39m Response body: {"access_token":"mock-jwt-token-1773612947126","token_type":"bearer"} Token after logout: CLEARED Auth API response: http://localhost:5173/login [33m200[39m Response body: <!doctype html> <html lang="en"> <head> <script type="module">import { injectIntoGlobalHook } from "/@react-refresh"; injectIntoGlobalHook(window); window.$RefreshReg$ = () => {}; window.$Refr ✅ Logout functionality verified: token cleared and can access login page

testcase.name: Authentication Flow › Admin user has access to admin features
testcase.system-out: Auth API response: http://localhost:5173/login [33m200[39m Response body: <!doctype html> <html lang="en"> <head> <script type="module">import { injectIntoGlobalHook } from "/@react-refresh"; injectIntoGlobalHook(window); window.$RefreshReg$ = () => {}; window.$Refr Mock: Intercepting login request to: http://localhost:8001/api/v1/auth/login Login request data: username=admin&password=admin123 Login credentials: admin [REDACTED] Mock: Sending successful login response Auth API response: http://localhost:8001/api/v1/auth/login [33m200[39m Response body: {"access_token":"mock-jwt-token-1773612958601","token_type":"bearer"}

testcase.name: Authentication Flow › Guest session respects daily usage limits
testcase.system-out: ✅ Guest session functionality verified: data storage works correctly

testcase.name: Basic Navigation › Homepage loads successfully
Basic Navigation › Can navigate to models page
Basic Navigation › Can navigate to canvas page

Basic Navigation › Backend health check works

Evaluate Page › intent input area is visible
Evaluate Page › no console errors on load
Evaluation System › Create new evaluation task successfully
Evaluation System › Real-time progress update visualization
Evaluation System › Display evaluation results with scoring
Evaluation System › Guest evaluation daily limit enforcement

Evaluation System › Evaluation task error handling
Evaluation System › Cancel ongoing evaluation

Homepage › 应该显示主要内容区域
Homepage › 应该响应式适配移动端
Homepage › 导航链接应该正确跳转

testcase.name: Mobile viewport (375x812) › homepage should render without horizontal overflow

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › prototype-smoke.spec.ts:65:3 › Prototype Page Smoke › Traditions mode renders Browse/Create sub-tabs

testcase.name: Research Page › page loads and shows heading
Research Page › tab navigation is present
Research Page › no console errors on load
Skills Page › page loads and shows heading
Skills Page › skill cards are visible (fallback data)
Skills Page › search input is functional
Skills Page › no console errors on load
VULCA 47D Display Issues › 检查47D按钮和数据显示问题
